name: Yates, Ira
evidence: Out-of-state donor in Paonia, CO 81428 (a small arts/orchard town in Delta County) who gave $3,000 to Travis County candidates Brigid Shea and Ann Howard. No occupation/employer on file; could not corroborate a specific individual (a musician 'Ira Yates' appears on AllMusic/Discogs but no confirmed tie to Paonia). FEC partisan lean 0.69 (Dem-leaning), 10 federal gifts. Identity unresolved.

name: Zeller, Charles
evidence: Prolific Democratic donor pattern (FEC partisan lean 0.9998, 1,382 federal contributions) who gave $3,000 to Jeff Travillion and Ann Howard, but no zip, occupation, or employer on file and no web source could tie the record to a specific identifiable Charles Zeller. Identity unresolved.

name: Carol Guthrie
evidence: Carol Guthrie is the Business Manager of AFSCME Local 1624, the union representing ~5,000 City of Austin and Travis County employees; first female Business Manager, inducted into Texas Labor Management Conference Hall of Fame (2025). Austin 78731 and AFSCME employer string on file corroborate. Gave to Travis County Commissioner Margaret Gomez.

name: Bitner, Marylin
evidence: Marylin Bitner is Owner/President of Plan A Locations, a Los Angeles film/TV/commercial location-management company (founded 1999, Hancock Park). LA 90004 address (540 N Rossmore Ave) and 'Entertainment industry' occupation on file corroborate; IMDb credits her as a location manager. Gave to Travis County Judge Andy Brown.

name: Hawkins, Albert
resolved_employer: Consultant/registered lobbyist, Austin (former Texas HHSC Executive Commissioner)
evidence: Best match is Albert Hawkins III, former Executive Commissioner of the Texas Health and Human Services Commission (2003-2008), earlier George W. Bush's state budget director and White House Cabinet Secretary; now an Austin-based health/HHS policy consultant and registered Texas lobbyist (Schlueter Group). FEC partisan lean 0.16 (GOP-leaning) fits a Bush official; gave $2,575 to Travis County Commissioner Jeff Travillion. No zip on file, so identity is probable rather than certain.

name: Hayes, Warren
evidence: Gave $2,575 to Travis County Commissioner Jeff Travillion, but no zip, occupation, or employer on file and only 1 federal gift (partisan lean 0.0). No web source could confidently identify this individual. Identity unresolved.

name: Gregorcyk, David
resolved_employer: Journeyman Construction / Journeyman Group (Vice President & General Counsel)
evidence: David Clark Gregorcyk is VP & General Counsel of Journeyman Construction (Austin commercial/multifamily general contractor and developer of luxury apartments and hotels), a board-certified construction-law attorney; office at 1000 N Lamar Blvd, Austin 78703, matching the donor zip. Gave to Brigid Shea.

name: Hayes, Kristina
evidence: Georgetown, TX 78628 (Williamson County) donor to Brigid Shea; multiple same-named individuals in that ZIP (a USAA insurance agent and a Keller Williams realtor among them) and no occupation/employer on file, so the specific person cannot be confirmed. FEC partisan lean 0.02 (strongly GOP) is atypical for a Shea donor, adding uncertainty. Identity unresolved.

name: Miller, Don
evidence: West Lake Hills / Austin 78746 donor who gave $2,530 to Ann Howard (2022-2025), but 'Don Miller' is a very common name with no occupation or employer on file; could not corroborate a specific individual. Identity unresolved.

name: Rhodes, Tom
evidence: Tom Rhodes is Co-Founder, President & CEO of Sente Mortgage, an Austin-based independent mortgage bank (founded 2007). 'CEO / Sente Mortgage' occupation and Austin 78746 on file corroborate. Gave $2,500 to Travis County Judge Andy Brown; notably FEC partisan lean is 0.08 (GOP-leaning) across 105 federal gifts.
